warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 8 mins
5 T2B or straight leg / hanging leg raise
5 Push Ups
5 Goblet Squats 24/16kg

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4 (0:00)
12 Hollow Rocks
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up (04:00)
EMOM x 3 (06:00)
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3 (09:00)
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3 (12:00)
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause when weightless
EMOM x 3 (15:00)
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
EMOM x 4 (18:00)
T2B Practice (fin 22:00)
E1.5MOM x3 - 30 Second Hold to Support - Rings or Parrallete (23:00)
EMOM x 4 Bench Dips x 10 (27:00)
EMOM x 4 Banded Dips (31:00)
EMOM x 4 Strict Dips (35:00)
EMOM x 4 Kipping Dip Practice (39:00)

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today emphasizes pushing (chest, shoulders, triceps) and core work; accessorize opposing pulling patterns and posterior chain.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: . Metcon: AMRAP 8 minutes: 5 T2B or straight leg / hanging leg raise, 5 Push Ups, 5 Goblet Squats 24/16kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, glutes.
